frame_analyses.description: Title slide showing SAGES educational materials for MIS surgery

frame_analyses.technique_notes: Outlining three main components: multimedia study guide, trainer box, and assessment

frame_analyses.description: Expert-derived proficiency metrics table showing target times and error allowances for all 5 tasks
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Task 1: 48s, Task 2: 98s, Task 3: 53s, Task 4: 136s, Task 5: 112s with specific error criteria
Describes institutional approach with protected time, proctored sessions, and proficiency goals

confidence_rationale: This is educational content, not a performance video requiring scoring
cannot_determine: No FLS task performance to score
technique_summary: Educational presentation about FLS program implementation and training methodologies

verbal_cues: Target should be representative of proficient population
Expert feedback during training sessions essential
common_errors_addressed: Using experience-based rather than proficiency-based criteria
Massed practice sessions vs distributed practice
Not training to overlearning for retention
